_comment: Manually-maintained native-image resource config (NOT generated by the tracing agent, so it survives agent regeneration). (1) OpenPDF bundled resources needed for PDF output: font metrics (.afm), the glyph list (glyphlist.txt), CJK font descriptors (.properties) and localized error-message files (.lng). Without the .afm files BaseFont.createFont fails ('Cannot load font Times-Roman'); without glyphlist.txt width computation breaks and OpenPDF then rejects the resulting zero font size ('Font size too small: 0.0'). (2) The whole PlantUML standard library (stdlib/**): hundreds of Brotli-compressed .spm files (awslib, elastic, C4, archimate, ...) loaded via Stdlib/SpmChannel through getResourceAsStream. The tracing agent only captures the libraries actually exercised by its diagram corpus, so unexercised libraries (e.g. elastic) would otherwise be missing and fail with FileNotFoundException on the FileInputStream fallback. Including the entire stdlib folder covers every library at once.
